evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-24 bounded live same-domain education leaf probes across 67 saved Ohio district or ESC roots. Exact local education leaves now verify strong county-grade routing for 51 counties and partial local routing for 24 more counties, but 13 counties still point to dead, unresolvable, transport-broken, or no-leaf roots (brown-oh => https://www.brown.k12.oh.us; clermont-oh => https://www.ccesc.org; columbiana-oh => https://www.ccesc.k12.oh.us; darke-oh => https://www.darkeesc.org; fairfield-oh => https://www.fairfieldesc.org; gallia-oh => https://www.gvesc.org; lawrence-oh => https://www.lawrenceesc.org; medina-oh => https://www.medina-esc.org; mercer-oh => https://www.merceresc.org; preble-oh => https://www.preblecountyesc.org; putnam-oh => https://www.putnamesc.org; trumbull-oh => https://www.trumbull.k12.oh.us; …).
